div.h1: File Offset vs Virtual Address Assignment

p.strong: Technical Specification: ELF Program Header Mapping Logic

ul.li: File: Size is 0. Does not occupy disk space.
Memory: Size is defined by p_memsz - p_filesz.
Action: Loader allocates zeroed pages at the end of the data segment.

div.p: To allow the kernel to map the file using huge pages or standard pages efficiently:
